content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.32%, Bank Nifty -1.57%, VIX +10.5% to 18.61 — clear risk-off tape with defensives (IT, Pharma, FMCG) bid and cyclicals (Auto, Realty, PSU Bank, Energy) sold. Book is well-positioned for this regime (heavy in IT/Pharma/FMCG defensives via COFORGE/WOCKPHARMA/LAURUS/MARICO/TATACONSUM/DABUR). Priority is trailing SLs on winners and respecting SLs on losers, not stacking new entries into a VIX-spike day.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Mild profit-booking on gold ETF (-1.1%). Thesis intact as risk-off hedge with VIX +10.5%. SL 121 sits ~2.2% below CMP — proper buffer. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marico +2.3% on strong Q4 (PAT +14%, revenue +22%), at 52w high, FMCG bid on risk-off. Current SL 825 already above entry — tightening to 828 (1.5% below CMP 840) locks in slightly more, preserves trail-gap discipline (>1% below LTP). Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.20,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.4%, today +7.11% on Q4 beat (PAT +144% YoY incl one-time tax reversal) plus Cigniti merger effective. SL already at 1357.20 = breakeven-plus-zone. CMP 1377 — gap is only 1.5%, near the trail-gap floor. Leaving SL here and letting it run to target 1420 (R:R favorable from here). Note: this is a no-op MODIFY at same SL/target — converting to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PIDILITIND -3.4%, near SL 1465 (CMP 1446.90 — actually BELOW the stored SL 1465 already, but position still listed — this needs SL respect). Wait, CMP 1446.90 vs SL 1465: SL is ABOVE CMP for a long, meaning position should have already stopped. Holding to allow engine to process; not micro-adjusting. Q4 was actually strong (PAT +37%, UVG 15.3%) — thesis intact at fundamentals level even if chart broke. Respect SL per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1605.00,
      "new_target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "WOCKPHARMA +1.1%, strong Q4 (PAT swing to +164cr from loss, EBITDA +148%, biotech +124% YoY emerging mkts). Pharma at 52w highs. Trail SL from 1600 to 1605 — wait, that's <0.5% move, violates micro-adjust rule. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF +0.3%, today +1.77%, Q4 PAT +47% FY26, Odisha refrigerants upsized to Rs 2300 cr. SL 2760 — 2.1% below CMP 2820. Proper buffer. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -0.6%, but on 3.3x volume holding well vs sector. SL 9020 currently only 0.3% below CMP 9072 — violates trail-gap discipline (forced-exit on next downtick). LOOSENING SL down to 8950 is NOT allowed (only tightening allowed). Reverting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction: SL can only be tightened. Current SL 9020 is 0.6% below CMP 9072 — tight, but I cannot loosen. Leaving as is. If it stops at 9020, accept the small loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 130,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ABCAPITAL -4.66% today, CMP 351.80 vs SL 354 — CMP is BELOW stored SL, position should fire on next print anyway. Heavy intraday selloff into a -1.5% Nifty session despite strong Q4. SL is doing its job; emitting EXIT to lock the exit at MARKET rather than wait for the SL trigger uncertainty. Loss -3.5% within risk budget."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -2% but holding well vs Auto sector -2.16%. Buyback at Rs 12,000 (+13.5% from CMP) provides hard floor. SL 10440 sits 1.2% below CMP 10565 — within tolerance. Buyback record date is the catalyst. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -2.4%, near SL 472 (CMP 476 — 0.85% above SL). FMCG bid today, Q4 PAT +15%, FY27 guidance raised. SL respect — let it work. Cannot tighten without violating trail-gap (already at 0.85% gap)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1240.00,
      "new_target": 1290.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +2.4%, today +4.18% on Pharma leadership and record Q4 PAT (+20.5% YoY, 6th consecutive YoY growth qtr). Trail SL from 1228 (above entry breakeven) to 1240 = +1.1% above entry. CMP 1256.90; new SL gap = 1.3% below CMP, just inside trail-gap discipline. Locks in min +1.1% on this winner."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM -2.6% intraday but rallied to 52w high earlier (+6.51% intraday peak). Q4 PAT +21.5% YoY, FY26 PAT +20%, fresh 52w high. SL 1198 = 1.5% below CMP 1226. Volatile but thesis intact post-Q4 beat. Respect SL."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Risk-off hedge, mild pullback. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock additional gains; FMCG bid on risk-off day; 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Big winner +9.4%; SL 1357 already lockign +7.8%. Trail-gap at 1.5% — at floor. Let it run to 1420 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near/at SL; respect the SL per Rule 17."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, thesis strong post-Q4 swing to profit; SL 1600 = -1.1% from entry, gap to CMP 2.2%. Holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, strong Q4. SL has proper 2.1% buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already tight at 0.6% below CMP; cannot loosen. Accept the tight stop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "CMP below stored SL — position effectively stopped. Emitting MARKET exit to crystallize."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at Rs 12000 floor; relative strength vs Auto sector. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near SL; respect it. FMCG defensive thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1240.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock min +1.1% on Pharma winner; trail-gap 1.3% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Intraday volatile; Q4 strong, 52w high earlier. SL 1198 has 1.5% buffer."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong BULLISH candidates surfaced in research: SUNPHARMA, TORNTPHARM (already pharma-heavy via WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS — cluster cap watch), BIOCON, HCLTECH/INFY/PERSISTENT (already IT-exposed via COFORGE), MCX, NTPC, CGPOWER. REJECTING NEW ENTRIES today because: (a) VIX +10.5%, Nifty -1.3% = risk-off macro tape; (b) deployment at 50% is appropriate for VIX-spike day, not a 'force admit' day per Rule 18; (c) book is already well-tilted to defensives (IT/Pharma/FMCG = 6 of 12 positions) — adding more pharma/IT names is cluster-stacking. BERGEPAINT rejected per Rule 11 (Q4 binary tomorrow May 12). BAJFINANCE-like extensions of held names also rejected.",
  "portfolio_notes": "HFCL MIS LIMIT order from prior session is STALE (placed 7556 min ago = ~5 days). It is an MIS order that should have been cancelled at EOD on its placement day — likely an engine artifact. Cannot CANCEL via decision schema; flagging for ops awareness. Book: 12 positions, ~50% deployed, 50% cash. Total P&L day +₹4,933 (+0.49%). Today's risk-off tape vindicates defensive tilt — IT/Pharma/FMCG all bid. Win-rate at 13% over rolling 5d is concerning but profit factor 1.2x means avg win > avg loss is keeping us net positive. Discipline focus today: respect SLs on PIDILITIND/DABUR/ABCAPITAL/TATACONSUM if they trigger, no panic-exits pre-SL (Rule 17), and don't force admits into VIX spike (Rule 18 fact-based risk-off case stated explicitly above)."
}
